name: OpenFE
description: Run protein ligand free energy calculation or Relative Binding Free Energy calculation.
capabilities: Run protein ligand free energy calculation or Relative Binding Free Energy calculation

pdb_file.description: Protein structure in PDB format for free energy calculation

ligand_files.description: Ligand structure files in SDF format for relative binding free energy calculation

num_lambda_windows.description: Number of lambda windows for free energy perturbation

simulation_time_ns.description: Simulation time per lambda window in nanoseconds
